title: Transitional provisions relating to section 15(2)(c)
content:
If—
	
(a)	
a female employee’s contract of employment is 
terminated by her employer in contravention of section 
15(1)(a) or (b); and
	
(b)	
the date of termination of the contract falls on or after 
the amendment date for section 15(2)(c),
section 15(2)(c), as amended by the 2020 Amendment Ordinance, 
applies in relation to the contravention, unless the employee’s 
confinement occurs before that amendment date.

metadata.source_file: Cap 57 Consolidated version for the Whole Chapter (24-08-2025) (English).pdf
